emails.subject: Stanford MBA- Interview
emails.body: Althea, I was trying to get in touch with this guy. Did he contact you by any chance? He missed the interviews on the campus. Vince Forwarded by Vince J Kaminski/HOU/ECT on 04/16/2001 01:51 PM "Seade, Juan J." <Seade_Juan@gsb.stanford.edu> on 03/19/2001 01:15:56 AM

emails.subject: Re: Stanford MBA- Interview
emails.body: Re: Stanford MBA- Interview Hi Vince, Unfortunately, I have not heard from him. He also forwarded his resume to Mauricio Mora, who asked if we could interview him. When I asked Celeste about it back then she decided against it. If you need some help tracking him down, let me know. Thanks, Althea Vince J Kaminski@ECT 04/16/2001 01:53 PM
